calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara Harris Chiang for (Petitioner) William Dillingham.

The Court stated that there has been distribution without court authorization. Ms. Chiang reported that she became involved at the very end of the process, that the previous attorney finalized and filed the petition and then left the office, that neither she nor Mr. Dillingham know why this happened. The Court noted that the parties had waived accounting and that it will not deal with that part and that there is an issue as to whether a reduction in fees is appropriate in light of the distribution. Ms. Chiang stated that this was a complicated matter, that Mr. Bloomfield's matters were a mess, that the business was left to 2 employees, that all that is left regarding the will is the contents of the house and a car and that the executors fees have been waived. The Accounting Petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kathleen Wright for and with William Dillingham. James Barringer for and with Mary Fahey and Flora Hinajosa.

Ms. Wright provided information regarding the bank accounts as well as the two businesses. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). The will is admitted to Probate. Bond is not required. The Court did not grant the request for authority to administer the trust assets. The Court also explained that Trust assets need to be separated, stated that the Trust is not before the Court and that the Executor only has authority to transact business in the Probate assets. Mr. Dilligham and Ms. Wright will be allowed to examine/look at the assets on May 2, 2013.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
